author: anon-a7c6025f
content: Results: 50 tokens in 93s (~1.9s/tok) vs previously hanging for 10+ minutes. Eliminated per-head causal mask and scale tensor roundtrips. Remaining bottleneck: softmax and dropout each do ensure_cpu/restore_device internally (GPU→CPU→GPU), contributing ~288 transfers/token. Next step: native GPU softmax and dropout kernels.
